---
toc: false
---

# Transparency {.unnumbered}

Transparency is ...

## Chapters in this section

::: {.section-card-grid}

::: {.section-card}
### Chapter 3: Vectors

blah blah blah

[Open Chapter 3](ch03-vectors.html){.section-button}
:::

::: {.section-card}
### Chapter 4: Structures

blah blah blah

[Open Chapter 4](ch04-structures.html){.section-button}
:::

:::

## What to focus on

As you work through transparency ...
